Security Policy
===============

Supported Versions
------------------

Security updates apply to the latest major version of the DaVinci Project Server.

Reporting a Vulnerability
-------------------------

If you discover a security vulnerability, do not report it publicly.

Instead, contact the project maintainer directly with:

- A clear description of the issue
- Steps to reproduce
- Potential impact
- Suggested fix (if known)

You will receive a response as soon as possible.

Responsible Disclosure
----------------------

Please allow reasonable time for the issue to be investigated and resolved
before any public disclosure.

End of File
-----------
